tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad Service Plans for NJ Transit Strike

payload.title: Metro-North Railroad Service Plans for NJ Transit Strike
payload.description: Update to the MTA Board regarding Metro-North Railroad service plans in the event of an NJ Transit strike

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North Railroad Service Plans for NJ Transit Strike
Update to the MTA Board
April 30, 2025
Metro-North Railroad Service Plans for NJ Transit Strike
Metro-North will accommodate its West of Hudson customers on the Hudson and Harlem Lines
A NJ Transit strike would affect West of Hudson Metro-North riders on the Pascack Valley and Port Jervis Lines
A strike by NJ Transit train operators could begin on Friday May 16 at 12:01 AM
Update to the MTA Board
A NJ Transit strike would affect West of Hudson Metro-North riders on the Pascack Valley and Port Jervis Lines
Drive to Nanuet Station on the Pascack Valley Line
A NJ Transit strike would affect West of Hudson Metro-North riders on the Pascack Valley and Port Jervis Lines
Drive to Salisbury Mills Station on the Port Jervis Line
West of Hudson riders have a great alternative: The Hudson and Harlem Lines
The Hudson Line will operate with additional train cars
Drive to Beacon Station on the Hudson Line
West of Hudson riders have a great alternative: The Hudson and Harlem Lines
Take the bus to White Plains Station on the Harlem Line

payload.description: A strike by NJ Transit train operators could begin on Friday May 16 at 12:01 AM

evidence_refs.source_quote: A strike by NJ Transit train operators could begin on Friday May 16 at 12:01 AM

payload.description: Metro-North Railroad Service Plans for NJ Transit Strike update to the MTA Board

evidence_refs.source_quote: Update to the MTA Board

tool_args.label: No West of Hudson service during strike

payload.claim_text: In the event of a strike, there will be no Metro-North West of Hudson service
payload.subject: Metro-North West of Hudson service

evidence_refs.source_quote: In the event of a strike, there will be no Metro-North West of Hudson service

payload.claim_text: All fare tickets will be cross-honored. Parking will be cross-honored at five stations (Cortlandt, Beacon, New Hamburg, Poughkeepsie and North White Plains). Free bus and ferry connections for West of Hudson ticket holders. The Hudson Line will operate with additional train cars.
payload.subject: Metro-North accommodations during strike

evidence_refs.source_quote: All fare tickets will be cross-honored • Parking will be cross-honored at five stations (Cortlandt, Beacon, New Hamburg, Poughkeepsie and North White Plains) • Free bus and ferry connections for West of Hudson ticket holders • The Hudson Line will operate with additional train cars

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

payload.claim_text: Metro-North will monitor ridership to determine additional service needs for shuttle bus or ferry service across the river and train service on Hudson or Harlem Lines
payload.subject: Metro-North ridership monitoring

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North will monitor ridership to determine additional service needs for:
Shuttle bus or ferry service across the river • Train service on Hudson or Harlem Lines

payload.claim_text: All fare tickets will be cross-honored. Parking will be cross-honored at five stations (Cortlandt, Beacon, New Hamburg, Poughkeepsie and North White Plains). Free bus and ferry connections for West of Hudson ticket holders. The Hudson Line will operate with additional train cars.

evidence_refs.source_quote: All fare tickets will be cross-honored
